violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Staff cleaned and sanitized slicer during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026

Containers of multiple foods and/or beverages were observed stored on the floor in the office, servers' storage room, and shared walk-in freezer. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 01/20/2026
Refrigerator door gaskets to the VIP reach-in were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the VIP ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

The pre-flush spray hose at the dish machine is hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026
The faucets at the 3-bay sink were observed in poor repair. Inspector observed no cold water at the first faucet and a leak at the second. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026
The trash area has an accumulation of litter and debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/03/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (can opener, slicer, ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Items taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
VIP Lounge refrigerator door gaskets and latch were observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025

The dish machine in the VIP Lounge was not dispensing sanitizer solution. PIC called for service. All utensils to be brought to main kitchen to be cleaned and sanitized until serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025

The following were observed in poor repair in the main kitchen: -ceiling over dish machine -ceiling tiles over storage hallway -missing tile over slicer area -wall corner (near storage area) -coving in storage hallway. New Violation. Correct By: 03/13/2025
